summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated EventFlow mobile event management app. All major features working correctly including dashboard with task sections, event creation, calendar, settings with custom reminders, and Google Calendar export. UI matches requirements with beige background and Ukrainian localization.
passed_tests: Backend API - All 12 endpoints working (100% success)
Dashboard shows ПРОТЕРМІНОВАНО section with overdue tasks (red border)
Dashboard shows СЬОГОДНІ section for today's tasks
Dashboard shows collapsible НЕЗАБАРОМ section for upcoming tasks
Task checkboxes work - can mark tasks as done on main screen
Archive button opens archive dialog with completed tasks
Can restore tasks from archive using X button
Events page shows calendar and events list below
Event detail dialog shows reminders with checkboxes
Can mark reminder as done in event dialog
Settings page shows current reminders with days input
Can add new custom reminder in settings
Can delete reminder in settings
Create event form works with all fields
Events display with CAPS titles
UI uses beige background #B2AFA8 (rgb(178, 175, 168))
Font family is Helvetica Neue as required
Bottom navigation has 3 tabs: ГОЛОВНА, ПОДІЇ, НАЛАШТУВАННЯ
Google Calendar export button works and is enabled
Desktop version shows ДОДАТИ ПОДІЮ button in header
Mobile version shows FAB (+) button
Task completion and archive functionality working
Settings changes are saved and applied to existing events
Event creation redirects to dashboard correctly
Event editing and deletion buttons present in dialog
Calendar shows proper date indicators
Mobile responsive design working properly
Ukrainian localization working correctly throughout app
